options.content:
Primary dashboard for multi-symbol runtime health.

Read top row left→right:
1) configured workers, 2) active workers, 3) utilization, 4) degraded symbols, 5) no-view cycles.

Then use **Activation Gap** and **Expected vs Activated Symbols** to explain why symbols are not starting together.

Use **Lock + Persist Pressure** and **Potential Blockers** for thread-safety/blocked-path diagnostics.

panels.title: Configured Workers
panels.description: Target number of symbol worker processes for the selected run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(NULLIF(context->>'worker_count','')::double precision) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}');

panels.title: Active Workers p95
panels.description: Observed active worker processes during snapshot cycles.

targets.rawSql: SELECT percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'active_workers','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}');

WITH c AS ( SELECT NULLIF(context->>'active_workers','')::double precision AS active_workers, NULLIF(context->>'worker_count','')::double precision AS worker_count FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ) SELECT ROUND(avg(CASE WHEN worker_count > 0 THEN (active_workers / worker_count) * 100.0 ELSE NULL END)::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM c;

panels.title: Degraded Symbols
panels.description: Count of symbols marked degraded by container runtime.

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(NULLIF(context->>'degraded_symbols_count','')::double precision) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}');

panels.title: No-View Cycles (%)
panels.description: Percent of cycles where active workers existed but no worker emitted fresh view_state in that cycle.

targets.rawSql: WITH c AS ( SELECT NULLIF(context->>'active_workers','')::int AS active_workers, NULLIF(context->>'snapshot_events_in_cycle','')::int AS snapshot_events FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ) SELECT ROUND((100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE active_workers > 0 AND COALESCE(snapshot_events, 0) = 0) / NULLIF(count(*) FILTER (WHERE active_workers > 0), 0))::numeric, 2)::double precision AS value FROM c;

panels.title: Workers: Configured vs Active
panels.description: If Active < Configured, not all symbol processes are currently healthy/running.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'configured_workers' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'worker_count','')::double precision) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'active_workers' AS metric, avg(NULLIF(context->>'active_workers','')::double precision) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Container Cycle Backpressure (p95 ms)
panels.description: High queue_drain/worker_reconcile/telemetry_emit often means orchestration pressure rather than pure bar compute.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'queue_drain_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'queue_drain_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'worker_reconcile_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'worker_reconcile_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'telemetry_emit_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'telemetry_emit_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'merge_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'merge_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='container_snapshot_cycle' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Activation Gap by Symbol
panels.description: First observed bar step per symbol and lag from run start.

targets.rawSql: WITH chosen_run AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id:raw}' = '__all' THEN (SELECT run_id FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1) ELSE '${run_id:raw}' END AS run_id ), run_base AS ( SELECT min(started_at) AS run_start FROM portal_bot_run_steps s JOIN chosen_run cr ON s.run_id = cr.run_id WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR s.bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ), first_bar AS ( SELECT symbol, timeframe, min(started_at) AS first_bar_at, count(*) AS bars_seen FROM portal_bot_run_steps s JOIN chosen_run cr ON s.run_id = cr.run_id WHERE step_name='step_series_state' AND symbol IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR s.bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') GROUP BY symbol, timeframe ) SELECT fb.symbol, fb.timeframe, fb.bars_seen, fb.first_bar_at, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (fb.first_bar_at - rb.run_start)) * 1000.0, 1)::double precision AS activation_lag_ms FROM first_bar fb CROSS JOIN run_base rb ORDER BY activation_lag_ms ASC NULLS LAST, fb.symbol;

panels.title: Expected vs Activated Symbols
panels.description: Compares strategy symbols for selected run against symbols that actually emitted bar steps.

targets.rawSql: WITH chosen_run AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN '${run_id:raw}' = '__all' THEN (SELECT run_id FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1) ELSE '${run_id:raw}' END AS run_id ), expected AS ( SELECT upper(value::text) AS symbol FROM portal_bot_runs r JOIN chosen_run cr ON r.run_id = cr.run_id CROSS JOIN LATERAL jsonb_array_elements_text(COALESCE(to_jsonb(r.symbols), '[]'::jsonb)) value ), activated AS ( SELECT DISTINCT upper(symbol) AS symbol FROM portal_bot_run_steps s JOIN chosen_run cr ON s.run_id = cr.run_id WHERE step_name='step_series_state' AND symbol IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR s.bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ) SELECT e.symbol, CASE WHEN a.symbol IS NULL THEN 'missing' ELSE 'active' END AS status FROM expected e LEFT JOIN activated a USING(symbol) UNION ALL SELECT a.symbol, 'unexpected' AS status FROM activated a LEFT JOIN expected e USING(symbol) WHERE e.symbol IS NULL ORDER BY status DESC, symbol;

panels.title: Per-Symbol Bar Throughput (events/min)
panels.description: Throughput by symbol; drops isolate slow/blocked series.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), COALESCE(symbol,'?') || '|' || COALESCE(timeframe,'?') AS metric, (count(*)::double precision * 60.0) / GREATEST($__interval_ms / 1000.0, 1.0) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Lock + Persist Pressure (p95)
panels.description: Lock contention and step trace persistence pressure from step_series_state context.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'trade_lock_wait_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'trade_lock_wait_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'trade_lock_wait_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'step_trace_queue_depth' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_queue_depth','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'step_trace_queue_depth') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'step_trace_persist_lag_ms' AS metric, percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms','')::double precision)::double precision AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(started_at, $__interval), 'step_trace_dropped_count' AS metric, max(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_dropped_count','')::double precision) AS value FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND (context->>'step_trace_dropped_count') IS NOT NULL AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Potential Blockers (Top Bars)
panels.description: Bars ranked by combined contention/backpressure signals.

targets.rawSql: SELECT started_at, run_id, symbol, timeframe, NULLIF(context->>'bar_index','')::int AS bar_index, ROUND(duration_ms::numeric,2)::double precision AS step_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'trade_lock_wait_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS trade_lock_wait_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'trade_lock_hold_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS trade_lock_hold_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_queue_depth','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS step_trace_queue_depth, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS step_trace_persist_lag_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS stream_emit_ms, ROUND(NULLIF(context->>'execution_decision_flow_ms','')::numeric,2)::double precision AS decision_flow_ms FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE $__timeFilter(started_at) AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') AND ('${timeframe:raw}'='__all' OR timeframe='${timeframe:raw}') ORDER BY GREATEST(duration_ms, COALESCE(NULLIF(context->>'trade_lock_wait_ms','')::double precision, 0), COALESCE(NULLIF(context->>'step_trace_persist_lag_ms','')::double precision, 0), COALESCE(NULLIF(context->>'stream_emit_ms','')::double precision, 0)) DESC LIMIT 250;

panels.title: Runtime Process/Thread Logs
panels.description: Worker start/fail, series step failures/degradation, runtime loop failures, and step trace pressure logs.

list.name: bot_id
list.label: Bot
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT bot_id AS __value, bot_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE bot_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1;

list.name: run_id
list.label: Run
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT run_id AS __value, run_id AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') ORDER BY run_id DESC LIMIT 2000;

list.name: symbol
list.label: Symbol
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT symbol AS __value, symbol AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE symbol IS NOT NULL AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') ORDER BY 1;

list.name: timeframe
list.label: Timeframe
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT timeframe AS __value, timeframe AS __text FROM portal_bot_run_steps WHERE timeframe IS NOT NULL AND step_name='step_series_state' AND ('${bot_id:raw}'='__all' OR bot_id='${bot_id:raw}') AND ('${run_id:raw}'='__all' OR run_id='${run_id:raw}') AND ('${symbol:raw}'='__all' OR symbol='${symbol:raw}') ORDER BY 1;
